hero.subtitle: AlixcoLuxe
hero.description: A workshop specializing in the creation of personalized art objects, we design unique, refined, and custom-made pieces. Combining elegance and precision, we customize wood, glass, metal, and leather to elevate your corporate gifts and fashion accessories.

trust.delivery_desc: Careful and tracked delivery for all your creations.
trust.quality_desc: Each piece is engraved and designed with utmost precision.
trust.payment_desc: Fully encrypted transactions for your peace of mind.

promo.description: Discover exclusive engraved pieces in a very limited edition. Offer valid while stocks last.

testimonials.subtitle: Testimonials
testimonials.title: Their Alixco Luxe Experience
testimonials.review1_text: The engraving on glass is incredibly fine. An exceptional piece in my living room.
testimonials.review2_text: Perfect corporate gifts. Our partners loved the elegance and quality of customization.
testimonials.review3_text: Masterful work on wood. The details are remarkably precise.

newsletter.title: Join the Private Circle
newsletter.description: Sign up to receive invitations to private sales and preview our new artisanal creations.

footer.brand_desc: The Art of the Unique and the Refinement of Custom-Made. Specialists in art, jewelry, and fashion customization to affirm your unique style.

products.subtitle: Our Collection
products.placeholder_desc: This masterpiece embodies the artisanal excellence of Alixco Luxe. Designed with noble materials for a timeless experience and elegance. Every detail has been thought out to sublimate your daily life.
products.empty_catalog: Our catalog will soon be enriched with new creations. Check back soon.

about.hero_description: At the heart of Cotonou, our workshop carries on an artisanal craft where laser precision meets human sensitivity, giving life to unique pieces made to last.
about.philosophy_quote: Perfection lies not in the machine, but in the hand that guides it.
about.philosophy_desc: At Alixco Luxe, laser technology is a tool in service of craftsmanship — never the other way around. Every creation is born from one demand: to elevate the material without ever betraying its soul.
about.process_step1_desc: We work with you to translate your idea into a technical drawing true to your vision.
about.process_step2_desc: Laser engraving and cutting with a 0.01mm tolerance, for a flawlessly sharp finish.
about.process_step3_desc: Every piece is hand-inspected before receiving its final finish and being delivered to you.
about.machines_desc: Our latest-generation laser engraving and cutting machines allow us to achieve unmatched precision on materials as varied as wood, glass, metal, or leather.
about.machines_list2: Compatible with wood, glass, metal, and leather
about.materials_wood_desc: Oak, walnut, and precious woods engraved to reveal the grain and character of each species.
about.materials_metal_desc: Brass, steel, and aluminum cut with a finesse that turns raw material into a jeweler's piece.
about.materials_textile_desc: Textile cutting and marking for unique fashion accessories with an impeccable finish.
about.materials_leather_desc: Full-grain leather hand-engraved for timeless pieces, rich in character.
about.location_desc: Come discover our workshop in Cotonou and discuss your next custom creation with our team.
about.open_google_maps_aria: View AlixcoLuxe workshop on Google Maps
about.cta_title: Ready to Create Your Unique Piece?
about.cta_desc: Explore our collection or contact our workshop to bring your custom project to life.
